steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The stated goal is to provide a specific example of what municipalities provide. The notes supply exactly one concrete example: water treatment.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — In 2020, the municipality of Xochicoatlán had a population of 7,015.: Population data does not name a service municipalities provide. ✗
  • Choice B — Xochicoatlán is one of 84 municipalities in Hidalgo, Mexico.: The number of municipalities says nothing about what services they offer. ✗
  • Choice C — Water treatment is just one of the many public services that municipalities provide.: This is the specific example from the notes that directly fulfills the stated goal. ✓
  • Choice D — The municipality of Xochicoatlán in Hidalgo is responsible for providing many public services.: Vague reference to 'services' does not satisfy the requirement for a concrete, named example. ✗
C is correct.
